arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola sports scar from Feyenoord capitulation as Manchester City boss sings during appearance at Barcelona's 125th anniversary gala
arts.sum: Barcelona stars of the past and present came together on Friday night to celebrate the 125th anniversary of the club but it was the appearance of Pep Guardiola that had everyone talking.

arts.ttl: Man City give up three-goal lead to draw with Feyenoord
arts.sum: Manchester City's woes continue as they give away a three-goal lead to draw 3-3 at home to Feyenoord in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Preview: Feyenoord vs. Fortuna Sittard - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Eredivisie clash between Feyenoord and Fortuna Sittard, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
